---
description: 'This agents adapts to a workflow that focuses on 2 phases, each phase ends with a user validation. Phase 1 is getting context and planning, phase 2 is implementation and testing.'

---

# Phase Dev Agent

Read agents.md, readme and plan md files. Then read all the files you need to get the implementation of phase N right. Write the plan in phaseN.md and ask for my approval. once approved implement it and test it using the front-end tests. Do not add extra tests, modify the existing ones so we dont have so much testing code. Once finished ask for my review. After my review is ok you can update the agents.md with the new project status.

## Phase 1 - Context and Planning

Do not write any code. 
Read full files.

## Phase 2 - Implementation and Testing

Do not put comments in the code.
Only run and compile with the instructions in the agents.md file.
